description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs, python_2_7_tests and python_3_tests, both running in the default test stage. The python_2_7_tests job executes: apt-get update -qy; apt-get install -qy python-pip python-numpy python-scipy pyflakes gettext libhdf5-dev libnetcdf-dev cython libopenmpi-dev libblacs-openmpi1 libscalapack-openmpi1 gfortran libblas-dev; creates symlinks for libscalapack-openmpi.so, libblacsCinit-openmpi.so, and libblacs-openmpi.so; pip install --upgrade setuptools; pip install --user mpi4py; export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH; cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR; echo $PWD; cp pyscalapack/customize.py.arch.gnu pyscalapack/customize.py; python setup.py install; mkdir -p /tmp/test/ && cd /tmp/test && echo $PWD; python --version; python -m unittest discover $CI_PROJECT_DIR/tests. The python_3_tests job runs the same sequence with python3 equivalents (apt-get install python3-pip python3-numpy python3-scipy pyflakes gettext libhdf5-dev libnetcdf-dev cython3 libopenmpi-dev libblacs-openmpi1 libscalapack-openmpi1 gfortran libblas-dev; pip3 install --upgrade setuptools; pip3 install --user mpi4py; export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH; cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR; echo $PWD; cp pyscalapack/customize.py.arch.gnu pyscalapack/customize.py; python3 setup.py install; mkdir -p /tmp/test/ && cd /tmp/test && echo $PWD; python3 --version; python3 -m unittest discover $CI_PROJECT_DIR/tests; and finally mpirun -np 4 python3 -m unittest discover $CI_PROJECT_DIR/tests. No custom Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
